name: tvt-sales-agent
description: Dynamic dispatcher over Tavant's fintech sales/intel/pm/create skill family. One entry point (tvt-sales-agent) instead of 22 named skills -- ask in plain language, a 2-tier deterministic-then-LLM-assisted matcher routes it. Multi-job requests split and sequence automatically. A genuine capability gap (no single skill fits) gets a recombination attempt across existing skills first; if that fails too, it's queued as a human-reviewed suggestion -- never an autonomous new agent (a real gating spike measured that approach unreliable, 66/24/70% against real skills, before it was ever built). Every dispatch decision is attested via a real, vendored audit ledger. Fully self-contained: every dependency is vendored in (see VENDORED_FROM.md), zero cross-repo references.
